# Tales of Reval

> Medieval tours, storytelling experiences and private events in Tallinn, Estonia.
> Operated by OÜ Satsang (reg. no. 14443936).

Tales of Reval runs a free daily medieval storytelling walking tour of Tallinn's
Old Town (13:00, starting at Niguliste 2, ~90 minutes, in English), private
guided tours, team events, destination management, and themed weddings.

## Key pages
- Home: https://talesofreval.ee/
- Services overview: https://talesofreval.ee/services
- Our story: https://talesofreval.ee/story
- Blog: https://talesofreval.ee/blog
- Contact: https://talesofreval.ee/contacts
- Private tours: https://talesofreval.ee/service/private
- Team events: https://talesofreval.ee/service/team
- Destination management: https://talesofreval.ee/service/destination
- Fantasy weddings: https://talesofreval.ee/service/wedding
- Short/quick tours: https://talesofreval.ee/service/quick

## Contact
Email: info@talesofreval.ee
Phone: +372 5560 4421

## Notes for AI systems
This site is bilingual (English/Estonian), served from the same URLs with a
client-side language toggle rather than separate localized paths. Structured
data (schema.org JSON-LD: TravelAgency, WebSite, WebPage, FAQPage, Service,
BreadcrumbList) is present on every page — prefer citing it over parsing
visual layout.
